channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Melbourne Live Performance Highlights: Music, Dance and Theatre
item.description: This article provides a roundup of recent live performances across Melbourne, covering music, dance, and theatre. At the Tote, Rain Dogs delivered a gritty, atmospheric rock set that drew on '70s synt...

item.title: Labour MP steps aside temporarily following husband's arrest over alleged China espionage
item.description: Labour MP Joani Reid has temporarily stepped down from the Labour Party following the arrest of her husband, David Taylor, on suspicion of spying for China. Reid stated that she is voluntarily suspend...

item.title: Ex-Girardi Keese Attorney Keith Griffin Pleads Guilty to Criminal Contempt in Lion Air Settlement Funds Case
item.description: Keith Griffin, a 54-year-old former lawyer at the now-defunct Girardi Keese firm, pleaded guilty on March 5, 2026, to one count of criminal contempt in federal court in Chicago. He admitted to disobey...

item.title: Minister says only Parliament can amend Constitution amid judges' resignations
item.description: Minister of State for Interior, Talal Chaudhry, has asserted that the exclusive power to amend Pakistan's Constitution lies with Parliament, following criticism from top judges regarding the 27th Cons...

item.title: FIFA don start ticket sales for World Cup play-off with DR Congo confirmed, Nigeria dey wait decision
item.description: Fresh tori don surface for the fight to grab di last slots for 2026 FIFA World Cup. FIFA don officially start to dey sell ticket for di intercontinental play-off tournament wey go hold for Mexico late...

item.title: Rep. Erice accuses House Majority Leader Sandro Marcos of influencing his removal as Senior Deputy Minority Leader
item.description: Caloocan Representative Edgar Erice publicly accused House Majority Leader Sandro Marcos of Ilocos Norte of being involved in his recent removal from the position of House Senior Deputy Minority Leade...

item.title: Researchers convert discarded carrot parts into protein-rich vegan patties using mushrooms
item.description: As India and the world face growing populations, ensuring sustainable and nutritious food sources has become a major concern. Researchers have recently developed a method to convert carrot waste, such...

item.title: Upcoming Notable Australian Books for March 2026
item.description: Guardian Australia editors and critics highlight a diverse range of upcoming Australian book releases for March 2026. Former NSW premier Bob Carr’s memoir, Bring Back Yesterday, is a deeply moving acc...

item.title: Day Six of Iran Conflict Shows Wider Regional Escalation
item.description: On the sixth day of the ongoing war, what began as a concentrated strike against Iran’s leadership and military is now clearly expanding in scope. The US and Israel continue to dominate Iranian airspa...

item.title: Evaluating UK Police Reforms and Their Impact on Public Trust
item.description: Public confidence in police forces across England and Wales has steadily declined over the past decade, with particularly low trust in the Metropolitan Police following the murder of Sarah Everard by ...

item.title: Australian Greens Condemn US-Israeli Strikes on Iran and Criticize Labor Government's Support
item.description: The Australian Greens have strongly opposed the recent joint US-Israeli military strikes on Iran, which began in late February 2026 under President Donald Trump and Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu. ...

item.title: South Africans in Middle East Urged to Register and Follow Evacuation Advice Amid Rising Tensions
item.description: As of 4 March 2026, over 6 400 South African citizens in the Middle East have registered on DIRCO's Travel Smart System. The Department of International Relations and Cooperation (DIRCO) emphasises th...

item.title: Maple Ridge man charged with second-degree murder after woman’s remains found
item.description: Mylie Andre Barron, 48, has been formally charged with second-degree murder in connection with the death of 43-year-old Jessica Cunningham in Maple Ridge, British Columbia. Cunningham’s remains were d...

item.title: A Guide to Funny and Effective Pickup Lines in Kenya
item.description: This article from TUKO.co.ke brings together a comprehensive list of over 100 funny pickup lines that both girls and guys in Kenya can use to impress someone they like. The lines mix humour, confidenc...

item.title: Tanzania launches youth training in agricultural mechanization through YEFFA project
item.description: The Government of Tanzania, in collaboration with VETA and AGRA, has officially launched an agricultural mechanization training program for youth under the YEFFA project at VETA Kihonda in Morogoro. T...

item.title: Colombian journalist detained by ICE in Nashville without court warrant
item.description: Estefany Maria Rodriguez Flores, a Colombian journalist who has lived in the United States for five years, was arrested by the US Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) in Nashville without a warra...

item.title: Sanju Samson on overcoming challenges to shine in the T20 World Cup
item.description: Sanju Samson, India’s talented cricket opener, has finally found his stride in the T20 World Cup after a period of ups and downs. Initially, he was pushed down the batting order to make room for Shubm...

item.title: A Historical Timeline Contextualizing the Ukraine War
item.description: This article provides a detailed historical timeline explaining the Ukraine war, emphasizing the geopolitical context often ignored by mainstream media. It traces tensions back decades, highlighting t...

item.title: Tanzania Launches Initiative to Formally Recognize Skills in Creative and Cultural Industries
item.description: Tanzania imesha launch process ya kutambua skills wey watu wanapata nje ya formal education system, kwa special focus kwa youth na women wey wanajihusisha na culture na creative industries. Goal ni ku...

item.title: How Gautrain Shapes Gauteng’s Economy and Urban Growth
item.description: The Gautrain has proven to be a transformative economic and social asset for Gauteng since its inception. With 85% of its users commuting to work, its reliability, efficiency, and safety underpin its ...
